task.title: Fix scaffold MCP chicken-and-egg: init CLI parameter override

routing.notes: All phases run. Low complexity but all phases are useful for quality assurance.

versioning.rationale: New optional CLI parameters on init = new backward-compatible feature (MINOR). If team considers it purely a bugfix, PATCH (6.0.2) is also defensible.

constraints: No new required Automation Config keys
Session restart required after .mcp.json creation -- cannot be avoided
YOLO mode must not hang waiting for interactive input beyond token collection

key_decisions_needed.question: Version bump: MINOR (6.1.0) or PATCH (6.0.2)?
key_decisions_needed.recommendation: MINOR -- new CLI params are a capability, not just an internal fix

key_decisions_needed.question: YOLO mode: should it invoke init (requiring token input) or just auto-downgrade?
key_decisions_needed.recommendation: Auto-invoke init (tokens are secrets that must be collected interactively even in YOLO), then auto-downgrade after .mcp.json is created
